name: @nicia-ai/lachesis-generator
description: Provider-neutral plan generation and resumable benchmark substrate for Lachesis
author: Nicia AI

scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "const api = await import('@nicia-ai/lachesis-generator'); const nodeApi = await import('@nicia-ai/lachesis-generator/node'); if (typeof api.generatePlan !== 'function' || typeof api.loadM1aCorpus !== 'function' || typeof api.loadM1cPreregisteredCorpus !== 'function' || typeof api.compileCodeMode !== 'function' || typeof api.loadM2PreregisteredCorpus !== 'function' || typeof api.runM2PairedBenchmark !== 'function' || typeof nodeApi.createJsonFileBenchmarkStore !== 'function' || typeof nodeApi.createJsonFileM2CodeModeStore !== 'function') process.exit(1);"
